videos.headline: Jalen Catalon cashes in pick-six for UNLV
videos.description: Jalen Catalon picks off a pass from Donovan Smith and returns it for a touchdown for UNLV.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Jalen Catalon cashes in pick-six for UNLV) 2024/08/31 ESHEET

videos.headline: Matthew Sluka combines again with Jacob De Jesus for UNLV TD
videos.description: Jacob De Jesus just manages to stay inbounds to complete a 24-yard catch from Matthew Sluka for UNLV vs. Houston.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Matthew Sluka combines again with Jacob De Jesus for UNLV TD) 2024/08/31 ESHEET
